input.headline: Fiber is something most people could use more of. But experts advise caution with ‘fibermaxxing’

raw.headline: Fiber is something most people could use more of. But experts advise caution with ‘fibermaxxing’

winner: Why did the scarecrow go bankrupt? He over-stuffed himself with Fibermaxx!

candidates.text: Why did the fiber maxxer end up in a pickle? Because he thought more was better... until he got a belly full!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clear and uses wordplay ('pickle' and 'belly full'), but the setup could be more surprising or specific. The humor feels a bit generic and lacks the punch of a stronger twist."}

candidates.text: Why did the scarecrow go to Fibermaxx? Because he needed some Straw-bulence!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the pun on 'straw-bulence,' but it's a bit forced and lacks specificity in relating to 'fibermaxxing.' The humor is mild and could be more surprising."}

candidates.text: Why did the yogurt become a fitness influencer? Because it started fibermaxxing!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline and uses 'fibermaxxing' appropriately, but the connection between yogurt and fitness influencers feels forced and lacks surprise or specificity."}

candidates.text: Why did the scarecrow go bankrupt? He over-stuffed himself with Fibermaxx!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline and uses 'Fibermaxx' creatively, but the connection between the scarecrow going bankrupt and over-stuffing himself with Fibermaxx feels weak and lacks surprise or specificity."}

candidates.text: I guess the next diet fad will be "Over fibering" - because who doesn't want too much of a good thing?
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the play on 'fibering,' but it's a bit generic and lacks specificity. The humor is mild and relies on a predictable twist rather than a surprising or original punchline."}
